testcase.name: logOut

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1233, 36). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.110) Build info: version: '4.17.0', revision: 'e52b1be057*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.17' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [bc62f1e7c03475238f8e8212907b9302, clickElement {id=f.D3015C329D4E878E080E5FC0F5E9978D.d.ABD69E4CDBFACF1FDA03FA98042264ED.e.998}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.110, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Guncha\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49677}, goog:processID: 19572, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49677/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.110, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (bc62f1e7c03475238f8e8212907b9302)] -> xpath: (//img[@class='profileImg'])[1]] Session ID: bc62f1e7c03475238f8e8212907b9302

testcase.name: verifyAddGroupLedger

failure.message: Location is not added. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Location is not added. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at
